title: Aira Stormglass Theme Card AI
sourceTitle: Aira Stormglass Theme Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable anime character theme card with anime character theme card with clear character identity, graphic card framing, and stylized collectible finish. Vertical 9:16 premium anime character theme card. Character: Aira Stormglass Series: Original Skybound Archive Card No: No. 027 Color palette: indigo, silver, lightning white, and violet glow Energy element: spiraling storm glass shards and vertical electric wind Info: Archive Pilot / Sky Clan / Thunder Lens; Realistic anime-to-live-action rendering, iconic character traits preserved, cinematic lighting, detailed hair, skin, fabric and metal textures. Character Name: Aira Stormglass. Fictional Series: Original Skybound Archive. Card Number: No. 027. Palette: indigo, silver, lightning white, and violet glow. Power Effect: spiraling storm glass shards and vertical electric wind. Info Lines: Archive Pilot / Sky Clan / Thunder Lens. Subject: Make Aira Stormglass the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: Vertical 9:16 premium anime character theme card. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use anime character theme card layout preserving these mechanics: 9:16 collectible character-card layout, top-down surge toward viewer, clean floating info modules. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in anime character theme card visual finish preserving these source cues: 9:16 collectible character-card layout, top-down surge toward viewer, clean floating info modules. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use indigo, silver, lightning white, and violet glow. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
